title: grastidium biflorum
intro: Grastidium biflorum, also known as the common pepperwort, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of glucosinolates. The health benefits of Grastidium biflorum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
